task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the project brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/office_project_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent initializes a new IFC4 project in BlenderBIM/Bonsai with the correct project name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender is open with the BlenderBIM/Bonsai add-on active. The project properties panel should show a new IFC4 project created, ideally with 'Meridian Office Tower' visible as the Project Name.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the spatial hierarchy with exactly 3 storeys at the specified elevations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Spatial Manager panel or Outliner in Blender shows a building hierarchy containing exactly 3 storeys (e.g., Ground Floor, Level 1, Level 2). The elevations (0.0m, 3.5m, 7.0m) should be visible in the spatial properties or inferred from the 3D viewport grid/snapping.

task_completion.description: Agent models the perimeter walls for the office building.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays multiple wall elements forming a building perimeter across the storeys, or the Outliner lists at least 12 'IfcWall' or 'IfcWallStandardCase' entities.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the completed IFC project to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, Blender info notification, terminal window, or file manager showing the file 'meridian_office.ifc' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the BlenderBIM/Bonsai graphical interface to author the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Blender UI, 3D viewport, and BlenderBIM panels, rather than just running a pre-written Python script in the terminal to generate the IFC file.

integrity.description: Agent actually modeled the walls in the 3D environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows the visual representation of the walls being added or manipulated, confirming genuine authoring rather than just editing text/metadata.

integrity.description: Agent exported/saved the project as an IFC file, not just a standard Blender file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The BlenderBIM 'Save Project' or 'Export IFC' button/dialog is used, rather than the native Blender 'Save As' (.blend) function.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project brief is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/office_project_brief.txt'. The expected project name is 'Meridian Office Tower'. The project must contain exactly 3 storeys at elevations 0.0m, 3.5m, and 7.0m. The model must contain a minimum of 12 walls. The final file must be saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/meridian_office.ifc'.
